sections.title: Talking to General Bentnoze or General Wartface

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Shut up Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: But me not say anything!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Shut up Wartface!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up Bentnoze!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: Shut up generals!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Shut up Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shut up goblins!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: What we do now Wartface?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Me dunno... maybe we change armour colour again.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Human, what colour you think best?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about brown?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Yeah brown is nice.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Thanks human.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Our soldiers need better weapons. We give them all warhammers!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: No no give them battleaxes!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Axes stupid! They things you cut wood with!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: But hammers things you put nails in wood with! At least axes sharp!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: You not need sharp when you have strong goblin swinging big lump of iron!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you want me to...

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up human, we sort this one out ourselves!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Me tell Mudknuckles make worm stew for dinner.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Me not like worm stew! Tell him make beetle pie!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Beetle pie give you wind! You smell bad enough already!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Now you've solved our argument, we gotta think of something else to do.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Yep, we bored now.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after Another Slice of H.A.M.
Talking to General Bentnoze or General Wartface

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: When Chosen Commander come to speak to us again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. I don't think she was making any progress when she spoke to you before.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: We listen to whatever she say!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Yeah, as long as she agree with truths of Big High War God!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Goblins mighty, war good, Big High War God greatest god!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think Zanik is likely to say any of that.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Then she not come here again!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Human! Did you save chosen commander from horrible fate?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! She's fine now!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: That good. Big High War God smile on you now. You honourary goblin!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Me tell Mudknuckles make worm stew for dinner.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Me not like worm stew! Tell him make beetle pie!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Beetle pie give you wind! You smell bad enough already!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Shut up Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: But me not say anything!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Shut up Wartface!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up Bentnoze!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: Shut up generals!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Shut up Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shut up goblins!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Last night I have vision of chosen commander. She say me biggest general, so me lead village.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: You not have vision! You make that up!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: In my vision, chosen commander say you say that. So now I know it true.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Well... I have vision too. Chosen commander say me big general!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: That not fair! Me have vision first!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Chosen commander also say you fat and stupid.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Now you've solved our argument we gotta think of something else to do.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Yep we bored now.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: What we do now Wartface?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Me dunno... maybe we change armour colour again.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Human, what colour you think best?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about brown?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Yeah brown is nice.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Thanks human.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Our soldiers need better weapons. We give them all warhammers!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: No no give them battleaxes!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Axes stupid! They things you cut wood with!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: But hammers things you put nails in wood with! At least axes sharp!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: You not need sharp when you have strong goblin swinging big lump of iron!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you want me to...

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up human, we sort this one out ourselves!

sections.title: When General Wartface does not have a line of sight to Bentnoze

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Where's Bentnoze gone now?
